title: Backend Developer Vacancy at L&T Infotech International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at L&T Infotech International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech International Enterprises in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
